name_cn:
Top-tier factory, complete packaging
New Dior Lady D-Joy 🌟 Calfskin Series
This Lady D-Joy handbag interprets Dior's profound insight into elegance and beauty. An elegant and classic style, meticulously crafted from nude pink calfskin, paired with light gold-finished metal 'D.I.O.R.' charms to elevate the style, adding a touch of liveliness to the exquisite silhouette. Equipped with a removable chain strap and an adjustable, removable leather shoulder strap, it can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal choice for daily looks.
Size 22cm
9240
